notes: v0.16.14 — Per-class XP/level/SP. Each ship class now has its own XP, level, and skill-point pool — SHARD's grind doesn't level BASTION any more. Account level (the umbrella that accumulates from every match) stays on the top bar + profile XP bar. Switching class now flips the displayed CLASS LV to that class's own number — pilot BASTION for the first time and you start at LV1 even if your SHARD is LV20. Saved under stats.class_xp / class_level / class_sp; existing saves keep their account level and start fresh per-class. Windows only.
